title: comfy outdated
description: Installed-vs-latest report for ComfyUI core and installed custom node packs. `latest` is null when the network lookup failed or the component has no known upstream; `outdated` is never true when `latest` is null.

installed.description: Installed core version (git describe tag, comfyui_version, or pyproject).

commit.description: Short HEAD sha when core is a git checkout, else null.

latest.description: Latest ComfyUI release tag, or null if the lookup failed.

outdated.description: True when the installed version is provably older than latest.

packs.description: One row per installed custom node pack.

name.description: Pack directory name or registry node id.

source.description: How the latest version was resolved.

installed.description: Installed pack version or local git HEAD.

latest.description: Latest version/HEAD, or null if the lookup failed.

outdated.description: True when the pack is provably behind latest.

checked_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the report was generated.
